# Plan and Implement

## Change Summary

{"change_summary":"Implemented `ralph-burning pr open` for the completed-run drain-loop success path. The command verifies completed run state, optionally runs gates, sanity-checks checkpoint commits, soft-resets to `origin/master`, renders a bead-aware commit message and PR body using the shared orchestration-state exclusion constant, commits, pushes, opens the PR through `gh`, and prints the PR URL. Git and gh interactions are routed through a mockable `PrToolPort`, with unit coverage for the happy path, run-state rejection, every configured gate failure, non-feature branches, non-checkpoint commits, no-checkpoint warning behavior, push failure, gh PR creation failure, and pure PR-body rendering.","steps":[{"order":0,"status":"completed","description":"Inspected existing bead workflow renderer, project/run store ports, CLI module plumbing, and repository conventions for drain-loop commands."},{"order":1,"status":"completed","description":"Added `pr` CLI module and wired `ralph-burnin
